overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game set in an ancient Mediterranean city at night. The player character, dressed in classical white robes, walks through torch-lit streets with intricate mosaic pavements, passing stone columns, statues, and formal gardens. The atmosphere is serene with cool blue moonlight contrasting warm torch flames.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade walkway with mosaic pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the colonnade, passing torch-lit walls and columns

entered.detail: tall stone pedestal with burning flame on top
low stone wall serving as seating along the walkway
classical building with columns covered in green vines
intricate geometric tile pattern in black and white
tall stone column with red painted bands near base and capital

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered colonnade at night, with mosaic tile pavement underfoot and classical columns lining the path. Torches on pedestals provide warm flickering light against the cool blue night, while a vine-covered building stands to the right.

events.description: exits covered colonnade into open courtyard with full sky visibility
slight turn to the right while approaching the large central statue

agents.ego_description: walking through the columned gate and approaching a large marble statue in the courtyard center

entered.detail: tall white marble statue of a robed figure holding an object aloft
long building with series of columns forming a covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the colonnade into an open courtyard, approaching a monumental marble statue. The space opens up to reveal the night sky, with the statue becoming the focal point as the character draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: geometric plaza transitioning to formal garden

events.description: ground surface changes from geometric mosaic to simpler stone paving as entering garden area

agents.ego_description: walking past the statue and through the open plaza toward the garden avenue

entered.detail: trimmed green hedge rows lining the path
round temple structure with domed roof and columns
tall evergreen trees with distinctive umbrella-shaped canopies

segments.scene_description: The character passes the marble statue and continues across a geometric mosaic plaza. Formal hedges and stone pine trees begin to appear as the scene transitions toward a more garden-like setting, with a circular temple visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined avenue leading to grand residence

events.description: distant NPC pedestrians become visible near the building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking down the tree-lined avenue toward the large mansion building

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near the mansion entrance

entered.detail: grand two-story building with red window shutters and columned entrance portico

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a tree-lined avenue with formal hedges, approaching a grand mansion with a columned entrance. The circular temple passes to the left as the path leads directly toward the large residence, where distant figures can be seen near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered colonnade into an expansive open-air estate under a moonlit sky. It begins along a covered path of mosaic tiles and classical columns, where warm flickering torches contrast with the cool blue night and vine-covered walls. As the character emerges from the colonnade, the space opens into a wide courtyard that centers on a monumental marble statue. The scene then shifts across a geometric mosaic plaza, passing formal hedges and stone pine trees as a circular temple appears in the distance. Finally, the camera proceeds down a tree-lined avenue, leaving the temple behind to approach a grand mansion with a columned entrance and distant figures waiting nearby.
